# CWE-208 negative: constant-time comparison hides mismatch position
lang: go
file: CWE-208-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/subtle"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-208 Observable Timing Discrepancy (mitigated)
func CheckResetToken(c *gin.Context, expected []byte) {
	provided := []byte(c.PostForm("token"))
	if len(provided) != len(expected) {
		c.JSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, gin.H{"error": "denied"})
		return
	}
	if subtle.ConstantTimeCompare(provided, expected) != 1 {
		c.JSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, gin.H{"error": "denied"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "ok"})
}
